creator: Mathias.Picker@virtual-earth.de
text:
Now that raptor and rasqal are in I built in on 9-stable and
"4s-backent-setup demo" crashes right away.

I do not have time to look closer, but this is the last thing it says:

4s-backend-setup demo
4store[36204]: backend-setup.c:185 erased files for KB demo
zsh: segmentation fault (core dumped)  4s-backend-setup demo

the backtrace:


This GDB was configured as "amd64-marcel-freebsd"...
(gdb) run demo
Starting program: /usr/local/bin/4s-backend-setup demo
4store[36243]: backend-setup.c:185 erased files for KB demo

Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
0x0000000800d23afa in ares_init_options ()
from /usr/local/lib/libcares.so.2
(gdb) bt
#0  0x0000000800d23afa in ares_init_options ()
from /usr/local/lib/libcares.so.2
#1  0x0000000800ae92ec in Curl_open () from /usr/local/lib/libcurl.so.6
#2  0x0000000800af4c96 in curl_easy_init ()
from /usr/local/lib/libcurl.so.6
#3  0x00000008008a268d in raptor_www_curl_init ()
from /usr/local/lib/libraptor2.so.0
#4  0x000000080087d56a in raptor_new_www_with_connection ()
from /usr/local/lib/libraptor2.so.0
#5  0x00000008008751fb in raptor_parser_parse_uri_with_connection ()
from /usr/local/lib/libraptor2.so.0
#6  0x000000000040ade1 in fs_metadata_open (kb=Variable "kb" is not
available.
) at metadata.c:90
#7  0x000000000040304e in setup_metadata (config=0x7fffffffd190) at
backend-setup.c:254
#8  0x0000000000402d34 in main (argc=2, argv=0x7fffffffd250) at
backend-setup.c:187

Cheers,

Mathias
